ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., T333A, T333C) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the variant (e.g., synonymous, non-synonymous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the variant */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the variant is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele at the variant position */,
  "alternate_allele" TEXT /* Alternate allele at the variant position */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the variant (e.g., high, moderate, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the data is derived */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue from which the data is derived */,
  "sequencing_technology" TEXT /* Technology used for sequencing */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being analyzed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being analyzed */,
  "cov2_2050" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2050) */,
  "cov2_2082" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2082) */,
  "cov2_2094" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2094) */,
  "cov2_2096" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2096) */,
  "cov2_2165" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2165) */,
  "cov2_2479" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2479) */,
  "cov2_2499" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2499) */,
  "cov2_2677" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2677) */,
  "cov2_2832" REAL /* COV2 score for variant in dataset (2832) */,
  "rCR3022" REAL /* rCR3022 score for variant in dataset */,
  "bind_avg" REAL /* Average binding affinity for variant in dataset */,
  "expr_avg" REAL /* Average expression level for variant in dataset */,
  "pipeline_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline run that generated the result */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pipeline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pipeline */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the pipeline */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the pipeline */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the pipeline */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the pipeline */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the pipeline was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipelines_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_datasets" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the variant in the dataset */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Additional annotations for the variant-dataset pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id", "dataset_id")
)
